# Gutsphere

> Gutsphere is a digestive-health copilot that helps people make sense of gut symptoms, prepare for care, and build a clearer health story — on web, iOS, and Android.

This file helps language models understand the public marketing site at https://www.gutsphere.com.

## Product

- Gutsphere is not a doctor and does not replace medical care.
- Primary conversion: start free at https://app.gutsphere.com/
- Demo embed: https://demo.gutsphere.com/ibs/
- Newsletter (Substack): https://newsletter.gutsphere.com/

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.gutsphere.com/): Primary landing — problem, journey, system, compare, pricing, FAQ
- [Who it's for](https://www.gutsphere.com/for): Situations and stages
- [About](https://www.gutsphere.com/about): Company / founder story
- [Journey](https://www.gutsphere.com/journey): Journey hub
- [Compare](https://www.gutsphere.com/compare): How Gutsphere fits vs trackers, AI chat, telehealth, test kits
- [FAQ](https://www.gutsphere.com/faq): Common questions
- [Privacy](https://www.gutsphere.com/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://www.gutsphere.com/terms): Terms and conditions

## Conditions

- [IBS](https://www.gutsphere.com/conditions/ibs)
- [IBD](https://www.gutsphere.com/conditions/ibd)
- [GERD](https://www.gutsphere.com/conditions/gerd)
- [Constipation](https://www.gutsphere.com/conditions/constipation)
- [Bloating](https://www.gutsphere.com/conditions/bloating)
- [Diarrhea](https://www.gutsphere.com/conditions/diarrhea)

## Features

- [Trackers](https://www.gutsphere.com/features/trackers)
- [Insights](https://www.gutsphere.com/features/insights)
- [Guidance](https://www.gutsphere.com/features/guidance)
- [Care](https://www.gutsphere.com/features/care)
- [Colonoscopy prep](https://www.gutsphere.com/features/colonoscopy-prep)
- [Endoscopy prep](https://www.gutsphere.com/features/endoscopy-prep)

## Planned / migrating from legacy Webflow

- Contact (`/contact`) — contact form (replacing Webflow `/contact-us`)
- Advisory (`/advisory`) — advisory intake form
- Resources (`/resources`) — guides and downloadable resources hub
